race.comment: SUPER NUI (6) game return with the 61.5kg when she sat on the speed to finish a narrow second over 1250m at Randwick Kensington. Proven in this grade and her best form is on rain affected tracks. Stalks the speed and expected to go close. MAYBE MOET (10) is a distance specialist going nicely through her grades. Was a month between runs when she savaged the line to finish seventh over 1300m at Scone. Can race closer here and has genuine top-three claims. ERNAUX (13) deep into the prep and due for a change of luck. Struggled with the 60kg when seventh over 1300m at Randwick Kensington. Gets in light with Grima's 2kg claim and can improve quickly. CREPE MYRTLE (2) talented mare yet to race on a rain affected surface. Ready for the 1200m now after dropping in trip second-up when fifth. Will roll forward and can take a hand in the finish.
